# RP Outreach Pipeline

*Auto-generated by `rp-pipeline`. Last updated: —*

---

## Dataview Queries (if Dataview plugin installed)

### Active Pipeline

```dataview
TABLE status, contact, angle, last_contact, next_followup
FROM "Practice/Rubinstein Productions/Outreach/prospects"
WHERE status != "closed" AND status != "passed"
SORT status ASC
```

### Follow-ups Due

```dataview
TABLE org, contact, next_followup, touch_count
FROM "Practice/Rubinstein Productions/Outreach/prospects"
WHERE next_followup != "" AND next_followup <= date(today)
SORT next_followup ASC
```

### Contacted (Awaiting Response)

```dataview
TABLE org, contact, last_contact, touch_count
FROM "Practice/Rubinstein Productions/Outreach/prospects"
WHERE status = "contacted"
SORT last_contact ASC
```
